1700.full_name: Mubashshir bin 'Abdul Mundhir b. Zanbar b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr
1700.arabic: مبشر بن عبد المنذر بن رفاعة
1700.bio:
Full Lineage: Mubashshir bin 'Abdul Mundhir b. Zanbar b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus
The Brotherhood was made b/w him and 'Aqil bin Abi al-Bukayr.

1701.full_name: Rifa'a bin 'Abdul Mundhir b. Zanbar b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr
1701.arabic: رفاعة بن عبد المنذر بن رفاعة
1701.bio:
Full Lineage: Rifa'a bin 'Abdul Mundhir b. Zanbar b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus
According to some source, Rifa'a and Basheer were same person with kunya Abu Lubaba.

1702.full_name: S'ad bin 'Ubaid b. Nu'man b. Qays b. 'Amr b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf
1702.arabic: سعد بن عبيد بن النعمان الأنصاري
1702.bio: He participated in the collection of the Qu'ran.

1703.full_name: 'Uwyam bin Sa'ida b. 'A'ish b. Qays b. Nu'man b. Qays b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik
1703.mother_name: 'Amira bint Saalam of B.Ummay b. Zayd
1703.bio: The Brotherhood was made b/w him and 'Umar bin al-Khattab or Hatib bin Abi Balta'a
1703.students: ل بن سعد عنه إن كان محفوظا

1704.full_name: Tha'laba bin Hatib bin 'Amr b. 'Ubaid b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf
1704.bio: The Brotherhood was made b/w him and Mu'tib bin al-Hamra of Kuza'a (an Ally of B.Makhzum)
1704.spouses: A woman from B.Waqif,Lubaba bitn 'Uqba of Ghatafan

1705.full_name: al-Harith bin Hatib bin 'Amr b. 'Ubaid b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf
1705.bio: He was sent back from Badr but he received the spoils of war.

1706.full_name: Rafi' or 'Amir bin 'Unjunda ('Abd al-Harith) from Bali of Quda'a, Ally of B.Umayyah B.Zayd
1706.bio: The Brotherhood was made b/w him and al-Husain bin al-Harith bin al-Muttalib

1707.full_name: 'Ubaid bin Abi 'Ubayd from Bali of Quda'a, Ally of B.Umayyah B.Zayd

1708.full_name: al-Saib bin Basheer bin 'Abdul Mundhir b. Zanbar b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr
1708.arabic: السائب بن أبي لبابة بن المنذر الأنصاري
1708.mother_name: Nusayba bint Faddala of B.Umayya of B.'Amr B.'Auf

1709.full_name: 'Utba bin 'Uwyam bin Sa'ida b. 'A'ish b. Qays b. Nu'man b. Qays b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik
1709.arabic: عتبة بن عويم بن ساعدة الأنصاري

1710.full_name: 'Asim bin Thabit ibn Abi al-Aflah (Qays) bin 'Asima b. Malik b. Umayya b. Dubaya' b. Zayd
1710.arabic: عاصم بن ثابت بن أبي الأقلح
1710.bio:
The Brotherhood was made b/w him and 'Abdullah bin Jahsh.
His body was protected by bees and hornets after his martyrdom during the event of al-Raji'.
1710.spouses: Hind bint Malik of B.Jahjaba B.Kulfa

1711.full_name: Mu'ttib bin Qushayr bin Mulayl b. Zayd b. al-'Attaf b. Dubaya' b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf
1711.bio: He may be one of the Hypocrites.

1712.full_name: Abu Mulayl bin al-'Az'ar b. Zayd b. al-'Attaf b. Dubaya' b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf

1713.full_name: 'Umayr/'Umar bin Ma'bad b. al-'Az'ar b. Zayd b. al-'Attaf b. Dubaya' b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf

1714.full_name: Sayfi bin Abi 'Amir bin Sayfi b.al-Nu'man b. Malik b. Umayya b. Dubaya' b. Zayd b. Malik b 'Auf
1714.bio: Full Lineage: Sayfi bin Abi 'Amir('Abd 'Amr) bin Sayfi b.al-Nu'man b. Malik b. Umayya b. Dubaya' b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus

1715.full_name: Hanzala bin Abi 'Amir bin Sayfi b.al-Nu'man b. Malik b. Umayya b. Dubaya' b. Zayd b. Malik b 'Auf
1715.arabic: حنظلة بن أبي عامر بن صيفي
1715.bio:
Full Lineage: Hanzala bin Abi 'Amir('Abd 'Amr) bin Sayfi b.al-Nu'man b. Malik b. Umayya b. Dubaya' b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus
His body was washed by angels after his martyrdom at Uhud.

1716.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Hanzala bin Abi 'Amir bin Sayfi b.al-Nu'man b. Malik b. Umayya b. Dubaya' b. Zayd
1716.bio: Full Lineage: 'Abdullah bin Hanzala bin Abi 'Amir('Abd 'Amr) bin Sayfi b.al-Nu'man b. Malik b. Umayya b. Dubaya' b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus

1717.full_name: 'Amir bin Thabit ibn Abi al-Aflah (Qays) bin 'Asima b. Malik b. Umayya b. Dubaya' b. Zayd
1717.arabic: عامر بن ثابت بن أبي الأقلح

1718.short_name: Abu Sufyan bin al-Harith bin Qays
1718.full_name: Abu Sufyan bin al-Harith b. Qays b. Zayd b. Dubaya' b. Zayd b. Malik b 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik
1718.arabic: أبو سفيان بن الحارث بن قيس
1718.bio: Full Lineage: Abu Sufyan bin al-Harith bin Qays b. Zayd b. Dubaya' b. Zayd b. Malik b 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus.

1719.full_name: Mujma'  bin Yazid bin Jariyya(Hartha) b. 'Amir b. Mujma' b. al-'Attaf b. Dubaya' b. Zayd
1719.arabic: عبد الرحمن بن يزيد بن جارية الأنصاري
1719.mother_name: Habiba bint al-Junayd bin Kanana of B.'Abs
1719.spouses: Salmah bint 'Abdullah bin Abu Habiba of B.Dubay'a

1720.full_name: Unays bin Qatada b. Rabi'a b. Khalid b. al-Harith b. 'Ubaid b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf

1721.full_name: Ma'n bin 'Adiy bin al-Jadd b.al-Ajlan b. Haritha b. Dubay'a ...b. Bali b. 'amr b. al-Haaf b. Quda'a
1721.arabic: معن بن عدي بن الجد البلوي
1721.bio: The brotherhood was made b/w him and Zayd bin al-Khattab.

1722.full_name: 'Asim bin 'Adiy bin al-Jadd b.al-Ajlan b. Haritha b. Dubay'a ...b. Bali b. 'amr b. al-Haaf b. Quda'a
1722.arabic: عاصم بن عدي بن الجد البلوي
1722.bio: He was sent back from Badr but he received the spoils of the war. He was involved in the destruction of Masjid Darar at Quba (built by Hypocrites).

1723.full_name: Thabit bin Aqram bin Tha'laba b. 'Ady b. al-Jadd b.al-Ajlan ...b. Bali b. 'amr b. al-Haaf b. Quda'a

1724.full_name: Zayd bin Aslam bin Tha'laba b. 'Ady b. al-Jadd b.al-Ajlan...b. Bali b. 'amr b. al-Haaf b. Quda'a

1725.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Salma b. Malik b. al-Harith b. 'Ady ..b.al-Ajlan..b. Bali b. 'Amr b. al-Haaf b. Quda'a
1725.arabic: عبد الله بن سلمة بن مالك

1726.full_name: Raibi' bin Rafi' bin Harith b. Zayd b. al-Jadd b. al-Ajlan ...b. Bali b. 'amr b. al-Haaf b. Quda'a

1727.full_name: Thabit bin (Yazid bin) Wadi'a b. Kudham b. Khalid b. Tha'laba b. Zayd b. 'Ubaid b. Zayd b. Malik
1727.mother_name: Umama bint Bujad bin 'Uthman of B.Dubay'a
1727.bio:
His father was one of the Hypocrites.
There is some confusion over his lineage. Some said that Yazid bin Thabit bin Wadi'a and him are same person while other said they are different. Some say Wadi'a was name of the mother.
1727.spouses: Wahba bin Suliaman of Ghassan,A woman from B.Unaif of Quda'a

1728.full_name: Kultum b. al-Hadm b. Imru'l-Qays b. al-Harith b. Zayd b. 'Ubaid b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf
1728.bio: Several companion and Prophet(ﷺ) arrived at his house after migration to Medina. He died before battle of Badr.

1730.full_name: Jabr/Jabir bin 'Atik b. Qays b. Haysha b. al-Harith b. Umayya b. Mu'awiya b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr
1730.bio:
Full Lineage: Jabr/Jabir bin 'Atik b. Qays b. Haysha b. al-Harith b. Umayya b. Mu'awiya b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus
The Brotherhood was made b/w him and Khabab bin al-Arrat. A/c to some acholars, Jabr and Jabir were two brothers.

1731.full_name: al-Harith bin Qays b. Haysha b. al-Harith b. Umayya b. Mu'awiya b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr
1731.bio:
Full Lineage: al-Harith bin Qays b. Haysha b. al-Harith b. Umayya b. Mu'awiya b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus
A/c to other scholars, He was not at Badr.

1732.full_name: Malik bin Thabit an ally from Muzayna

1733.full_name: al-Nu'man bin 'Asar of B.Bali b. 'Amr b. al-Haaf b. Quda'a

1734.full_name: Basheer bin 'Atik b. Qays b. Haysha b. al-Harith b. Umayya b. Mu'awiya b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr
1734.bio: Full Lineage: Basheer bin 'Atik b. Qays b. Haysha b. al-Harith b. Umayya b. Mu'awiya b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus

1735.full_name: al-Mundhir bin Muhammad b. 'Uqba b. Uhayha b. al-Julah b. al-Harish b. Jahjaba b. Kulfa b. 'Auf
1735.mother_name: A woman from Abu Farwa(Qurda) of Hudhayl
1735.bio:
Full Lineage: al-Mundhir bin Muhammad b. 'Uqba b. Uhayha b. al-Julah b. al-Harish b. Jahjaba b. Kulfa b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus
The Brotherhood was made b/w him and al-Taufayl bin al-Harith bin al-Muttalib.

1736.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin 'Abdullah b. Tha'laba b. Bayhan b. 'Amir b. al-Harith b. Malik b. Unaif b. Jushum
1736.bio: Lineage: 'Abdur Rahman bin 'Abdullah b. Tha'laba b. Bayhan b. 'Amir b. al-Harith b. Malik b. Unaif b. Jushum b. 'Aidhullah b. Tamim of Bali b. 'Amr b. al-Haf b. Quda'a an Ally B.Jahjaba B.Kulfa.

1737.full_name: Saalam bin 'Umayr bin Thabit bin Kulfa bin Tha'laba b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus
1737.bio:
Full Lineage: Saalam bin 'Umayr bin Thabit bin Kulfa bin Tha'laba b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus OR
Saalam bin 'Umayr/'Amr/'Abdullah bin Thabit bin al-Nu'man b. Umayya b. al-Burak (Imru'ul-Qays) b. Tha'laba b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus
He was a poor companion who didn't have a ride (animal) for the journey of Tabuk. He cried when Prophet(ﷺ) can't help him find the ride for the journey.

1738.full_name: 'Asim bin Qays bin Thabit bin Kulfa bin Tha'laba b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus
1738.bio:
Full Lineage: 'Asim bin Qays bin Thabit bin Kulfa bin Tha'laba b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus OR
'Asim bin Qays bin Thabit bin al-Nu'man b. Umayya b. al-Burak (Imru'ul-Qays) b. Tha'laba b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus

1739.full_name: al-Nu'man bin Abi Khadhma bin al-Nu'man b. Umayya b. al-Burak (Imru'ul-Qays)  b. Tha'laba
1739.arabic: النعمان بن أبي خذمة بن النعمان
1739.bio:
Full Lineage: al-Nu'man bin Abi Khadhma bin al-Nu'man b. Umayya b. al-Burak (Imru'ul-Qays) b. Tha'laba b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus or
al-Nu'man bin Abi Khadhma bin al-Nu'man b. Abi Hudhayfa b. al-Burak (Imru'ul-Qays) b. Tha'laba b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus
There is some disagreement over his lineage.

1740.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Jubayr b. al-Nu'man b. Umayya b. al-Burak (Imru'ul-Qays)  b. Tha'laba b. 'Amr b. 'Auf
1740.arabic: عبد الله بن جبير بن النعمان
1740.mother_name: A woman from B.'Abdullah ibn Ghatafan
1740.bio:
Full Lineage: 'Abdullah bin Jubayr b. al-Nu'man b. Umayya b. al-Burak (Imru'ul-Qays) b. Tha'laba b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus
He was the leader of the 50 archers on the day of Uhud. He stayed on the hill as instructed by Prophet(ﷺ) and was eventually martyred.

1741.full_name: Khawwat bin Jubayr b. al-Nu'man b. Umayya b. al-Burak (Imru'ul-Qays)  b. Tha'laba b. 'Amr b. 'Auf
1741.mother_name: A woman from B.'Abdullah ibn Ghatafan
1741.bio:
Full Lineage: Khawwat bin Jubayr b. al-Nu'man b. Umayya b. al-Burak (Imru'ul-Qays) b. Tha'laba b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus
On his way to Badr, he was injured so he was sent back but he received the spoils of the battle of Badr.
1741.spouses: A woman from B.Tha'laba,'Amira bint Hanzala of B.'Unayf al-Quda'a

1742.full_name: al-Harith bin al-Nu'man b. Umayya b. al-Burak (Imru'ul-Qays)  b. Tha'laba b. 'Amr b. 'Auf
1742.bio: Full Lineage: al-Harith b. al-Nu'man b. Umayya b. al-Burak (Imru'ul-Qays) b. Tha'laba b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus

1743.full_name: al-Nu'man/'Umayr bin Thabit bin al-Nu'man b. Umayya b. al-Burak (Imru'ul-Qays)  b. Tha'laba
1743.bio: Full Lineage: al-Nu'man bin Thabit bin al-Nu'man b. Umayya b. al-Burak (Imru'ul-Qays) b. Tha'laba b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus

1744.full_name: Malik (b. 'Amir/'Amr) bin Thabit bin al-Nu'man b. Umayya b. al-Burak (Imru'ul-Qays)  b. Tha'laba
1744.bio:
Full Lineage: al-Nu'man bin Thabit bin al-Nu'man b. Umayya b. al-Burak (Imru'ul-Qays) b. Tha'laba b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus or
Malik bin 'Amr bin Thabit bin Kulfa bin Tha'laba b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus
There is some confusion about this companion in his lineage, Kunya and whether he was martyred at Uhud or not.

1745.full_name: Sa'd bin Khaythama b. al-Harith b. Malik b. Ka'b b. al-Nahhat b. Ka'b b. Haritha b. Ghanm b. al-Salm
1745.bio:
Full lineage : Sa'd bin Khaythama b. al-Harith b. Malik b. Ka'b b. al-Nahhat b. Ka'b b. Haritha b. Ghanm b. al-Salm b. Imru'ul -Qays b. Malik b. al-Aus
The brotherhood was made b/w him and Abu Salama bin 'Abdul Asad

1746.full_name: al-Mundhir bin Qadama bin al-Harith('Arjafa) b. Malik b. Ka'b b. al-Nahhat b. Ka'b b. Haritha
1746.bio: Full Lineage: al-Mundhir bin Qadama bin (al-Harith b. Malik)/('Arjafa) b. Ka'b b. al-Nahhat b. Ka'b b. Haritha b. Ghanm b. al-Salm b. Imru'ul -Qays b. Malik b. al-Aus

1747.full_name: Malikbin Qadama bin al-Harith('Arjafa) b. Malik b. Ka'b b. al-Nahhat b. Ka'b b. Haritha
1747.bio: Full Lineage: Malik bin Qadama bin (al-Harith b. Malik)/('Arjafa) b. Ka'b b. al-Nahhat b. Ka'b b. Haritha b. Ghanm b. al-Salm b. Imru'ul -Qays b. Malik b. al-Aus

1748.full_name: al-Harith bin 'Arjafa bin al-Harith b. Malik b. Ka'b b. al-Nahhat b. Ka'b b. Haritha b. Ghanm
1748.bio: Full Lineage: al-Harith bin 'Arjafa (b. al-Harith b. Malik) b. Ka'b b. al-Nahhat b. Ka'b b. Haritha b. Ghanm b. al-Salm b. Imru'ul -Qays b. Malik b. al-Aus

1749.short_name: Tamim client of B. Ghanm b. al-Salm
1749.full_name: Tamim client of B. Ghanm b. al-Salm (or S'ad bin Khaythama)
1749.arabic: تميم مولى بني غنم بن السلم

1750.full_name: al-Shamus bint Abi 'Amir bin Sayfi b.al-Nu'man b. Malik b. Umayya b. Dubaya' b. Zayd b. Malik b 'Auf
1750.bio: Full Lineage: al-Shamus bint Abi 'Amir('Abd 'Amr) bin Sayfi b.al-Nu'man b. Malik b. Umayya b. Dubaya' b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus

1751.full_name: Habiba bint Abi 'Amir bin Sayfi b.al-Nu'man b. Malik b. Umayya b. Dubaya' b. Zayd b. Malik b 'Auf
1751.bio: Full Lineage: Habiba bint Abi 'Amir('Abd 'Amr) bin Sayfi b.al-Nu'man b. Malik b. Umayya b. Dubaya' b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus

1752.full_name: 'Usayma bint Abi al-Aflah (Qays) bin 'Asima b. Malik b. Umayya b. Dubaya' b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf

1753.full_name: al-Sahmus bint al-Nu'man b. 'Amir b. Mujma' b. al-'Attaf b. Dubaya' b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf

1754.short_name: Tamima bint Abu Sufyan bin al-Harith
1754.full_name: Tamima bint Abi Sufyan bin al-Harith b. Qays b. Zayd b. Dubaya' b. Zayd b. Malik b 'Auf b. 'Amr
1754.arabic: تميمة بنت أبي سفيان بن الحارث

1755.short_name: Layla bint Abu Sufyan bin al-Harith
1755.full_name: Layla bint Abi Sufyan bin al-Harith b. Qays b. Zayd b. Dubaya' b. Zayd b. Malik b 'Auf b. 'Amr
1755.arabic: ليلى بنت أبي سفيان بن الحارث
1755.spouses: Mu'adh bin Amir bin Jariyya,Bukayr bin Jariyya

1756.full_name: 'A'isha/Maryam bint Abi Sufyan bin al-Harith b. Qays b. Zayd b. Dubaya' b. Zayd b. Malik b 'Auf
1756.arabic: ليلى بنت أبي سفيان بن الحارث
1756.spouses: Mu'adh bin 'amir bin Jariyya of B.Dubay'a

1758.full_name: Lubaba bint Basheer bin 'Abdul Mundhir b. Zanbar b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr
1758.mother_name: Nusayba bint Faddala of B.Umayya of B.'Amr B.'Auf

1759.full_name: Nusayba bint Simak bin Nu'man b. Qays b. 'Amr b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr

1760.full_name: Unaysa bint Sa'ida b. 'A'ish b. Qays b. Nu'man b. Qays b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik
1760.mother_name: 'Amira bint Saalam of B.Ummay b. Zayd

1761.full_name: 'Umayra bint 'Umayr b. Sa'ada b. 'A'ish b. Qays b. Nu'man b. Qays b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik

1762.full_name: Hafsa bint  Hatib bin 'Amr b. 'Ubaid b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf

1763.full_name: Sa'ida bint Bashir bin 'Ubaid b. 'Amr b. 'Ubaid b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr
1763.arabic: سعيدة بنت بشر بن عبيدة الأنصارية

1764.full_name: 'Amira bint Kultum b. al-Hadm b. Imru'l-Qays b. al-Harith b. Zayd b. 'Ubaid b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf
1764.arabic: عميرة بنت كلثوم بن الهدم الأنصارية

1765.full_name: 'Amira/'Amra bint  'Ubaid b. Mutruf b. al-Harith b. Zayd b. 'Ubiad b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr
1765.arabic: عميرة / عمرة بنت عبيد بن مطروف

1766.full_name: 'Amir bin Thabit b. Salma b 'Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus

1767.full_name: S'ad bin Nu'man b. Qays b. 'Amr b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf

1768.full_name: Simak bin Nu'man b. Qays b. 'Amr b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf

1769.full_name: Faddala bin Nu'man b. Qays b. 'Amr b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf

1770.full_name: Thubayta bint Yi'ar ... b. Zayd b. 'Ubaid b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf
1770.father_name: Yi'ar ... b. Zayd b. 'Ubaid b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'A
1770.bio: She freed Salim, the client of Abu Hudhayfa who adapted him.

1771.full_name: Salma bint Yi'ar ... b. Zayd b. 'Ubaid b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf
1771.father_name: Yi'ar ... b. Zayd b. 'Ubaid b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'A
